title: The Landlord's Game: Quest For 'Wide Moat' Apartment REITs
text: I have a passion for the boardgame Monopoly, and perhaps that's also the reason I love owning shares in real estate investment trusts (REITs). By playing Monopoly, I learned a lot about the strategy for winning and thus building powerful scale advantage so that I could crush my opponents.

title: Essex Property Trust: Another Beat-And-Raise Quarter
text: Back in January, I expected Apartment REITs like Essex Property Trust to outperform the REIT average. Thanks to the mad rush to high yield brought on by inflation, that hasn't happened. Essex Property Trust has been typical of Apartment REITs in its total return. The price movement, however, stands in sharp contrast to the company's performance.

title: These Stocks Cut You a Quarterly Paycheck
text: Profit from passive income and stable performance from two Dividend Aristocrats -- and one Dividend King.
